/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/fed_server.dir/src/fed/server_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fed_server.dir/src/fed/server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fed_server.dir/src/fed/crypto.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fed_server.dir/src/fed/aes_crypto.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fed_server.dir/src/fed/audit_logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fed_server.dir/src/fed/auth_manager.cpp.o -o fed_server  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/cuda-12.4/targets/x86_64-linux/lib -lpthread libfed_cuda.a /usr/local/cuda-12.4/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libcudart.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so
